nasb.text: Then Haggai, the messenger of the Lord, spoke by the commission of the Lord to the people saying, “ ‘I am with you,’ declares the Lord.”

esv.text: Then Haggai, the messenger of the Lord, spoke to the people with the Lord’s message, “I am with you, declares the Lord.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者哈該，奉耶和華的命，對眾民說：“耶和華說：‘我與你們同在。’”

ccb.text: 耶和华的使者哈该向百姓传达耶和华的话，说：“耶和华说，‘我与你们同在。’”
